subcodes.first_line: O ancient friend! Praise be unto God, thy countenance is as the Paradise of Delight and thy nature as the celestial garden. Ever in service to His Holiness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار دیرین الحمد لله رویت جنه النعیم است و خویت بهشت برین همواره بخدمت حضرت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @characteristics and conduct of true believers
